name: Trevor
text: Hey! A lot of people think one piece of trash does not matter, but it really does.

name: Trevor
text: If recyclable materials are thrown away, they are wasted instead of being turned into something new.

name: Trevor
text: Recycling helps reduce pollution in the air, on land, and in the water.

name: Trevor
text: It also lowers the pressure on forests, mines, and other natural resources.

name: Trevor
text: Many everyday objects can have a second life if we dispose of them in the right way.

name: Trevor
text: That is why learning how to sort waste properly is such an important habit.

name: Trevor
text: With a little effort from everyone, recycling can help create a greener future.
